ab: Malu namu ho, desun maku alang smiling rdrudan.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: Malu o! maha ta rmengo kari seediq rdrudan.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說賽德克語。
en: B: Yes! We’re going to talk to the seniors in Sederic.

ab: Uxe ta beyo dehuk da?
en: A: Are we almost there?

ab: Pdehuk da.
en: B:Almost there.

ab: Tama rudan/baki, meyah nami qmita isu.
en: A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: Han! Han! Mkela namu rmengo kari ta seediq, teyan bale knmalu.
ch: B:你們會說賽德克語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B: You speak sydykes! That’s great!

ab: Malu namu ho, desu maku meepah phmaan macu.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.

ab: Un, mptgesa.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: Eyah mtbeku kana, adis ba parih kana qqeya.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: Un, mptgesa, nii nami desu kana qqeya.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.

ab: Dehuk ta di?
en: A: Are we there yet?

ab: Ini dehuk na, theya hari.
en: B: Not yet, it’s still far away.

ab: Usa cmuwaq qsiya ka isu.
en: A: You go watering.

ab: Un, cwaqe ku qsiya.
en: B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: Sayi mangan ka aduk qbheni.
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: Un, saye mu maduk ka qbheni.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: Malu namu ho? Maha ta Tongwuyen ali saya.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: Teyan ba knmalu! Mhuwa ta mesa musa?
ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?

ab: Taapa ta rulu musa.
en: A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: Bleiq mtbeku kana, mbari ta kipu.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.

ab: Un.
en: B: Yes.

ab: Berah na ge qqbheni, bukuy na ge quyu, qtai naq kana ta.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.

ab: Miicu ku quyu mbtgesa.
en: B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: Ini huwa, usa qmita qbeheni isu denu.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: Bobo 1 patis hido de, eyah ta mtbeku msseli hini.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.

ab: Un, mhuwe su mptgesa.
en: B: Yes, thank you.

ab: Maanu qntaan su ali saya?
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: Mnita ku egu ba quyu ma egu ba qqbheni.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.

ab: Nahari, maha ta di.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: Tri ku tikoh, nii muuwic ka papak mu.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.

ab: Suupu ta musa lmanguy ho?
en: A: Shall we go swimming together?

ab: Malu ma, nita.
en: B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: Egu riyung seediq nii lmanguy hini.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: Rcilung mgtuma hiya, enaq ta lmanguy hini ka ita.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
